meaning: vt.淹没,覆没,受打击,制服,压倒
examples: It was clear that one massive Allied offensive would overwhelm the weakened enemy.
There is this "detachment" and I realize that there are obviously experiences which would overwhelm everyone.
Initially unrestrained by predators of their own, foreign predators are likely to be able to multiply rapidly and overwhelm intended targets.
The showings are so spectacular they overwhelm the drain on investors' returns from its 4.75% upfront sales load.
Me too, but not because its bells and whistles overwhelm its editorial content, as Jeff implies.
